programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny dons powerful dino-mech armor to dig up Cap'n No-Beard's treasure beneath Mt. Sibo, making him more than a match for our heroes ... and a mighty allosaurus that unexpectedly joins the party!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all ... in the form of the T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin must choose between Ras and the Ninja as the battle for the Prismatic Blades rages across the World Forest.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Worriz and Cragger go off on a mission of their own, but get captured by the Spiders. Now it is up to the rest of the heroes to go on one last daring rescue mission.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: In the Scorpion Cave, Laval has been separated from his friends and must overcome his greatest fear to rescue the Lion Legend Beast … or will it rescue him?

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: ¡Vuelve la locura de Super Shore a las costas mediterráneas! Uno a uno llegan a la mansión, la tropa internacional de la fiesta, con una sorpresa enorme para toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Esteban está de mal humor y nadie entiende por qué, su amistad con Fernando pende de un hilo y eso genera tensión en el grupo. Mientras tanto de Italia le llega una sorpresa enorme a Abraham.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras los chicos se encuentran en una fiesta, aparece sorpresivamente una amiga italiana de Abraham que provocará un gran conflicto de regreso a la casa. El verano Marbellí está que arde y el calor parece afectar las emociones de todos.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La relación entre Igor y Talía cada vez se hace más intensa y amorosa y por supuesto esto a Arantxa no le cae nada bien y la pone en un lugar caliente, llevando la tensión a toda la casa

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todos contra todos, Electra y Arantxa atacan a Igor, el brasileño ataca a Electra, la casa es un revuelo y encima llega visita que se pone demasiado pesada.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La situación de Talía e Igor no estaría siendo la mejor. No hablar con Arantxa la lleva a quedar expuesta porque la española toma la iniciativa y le dice sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Kyle y Chloe de Geordie Shore llegan a Súper Shore y hacen historia al llegar a la casa de sorpresa para pasar unos días con los chicos. Los Ingleses muestran por qué son tan respetados y agarran fiesta muy duro.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La primera noche de Karime y Labrador en la casa se celebra con una grandiosa fiesta en la que Cañete es víctima de Karime. Para salir de la dinámica de fiestas y chiringuitos de playa, los chicos planean irse de acampada.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must undermine "the Butcher of the Balkans," Janos Karq, by having his head of security capture an agent, Sparrow, who will then incriminate Karq.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Imry Rogosh is a mass murderer who kills to foment political upheaval. He is targeting Los Angeles, so the IMF knocks him out in a car accident.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF team goes in as a circus team to rescue Anton Cardinal Vossek, who is being held in the impregnable Seravno Prison.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: While Guy and Lee are away, two impostors dressed like them sneak into Hidden Leaf Village.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Land of Birds is in turmoil due to a specter known as the Cursed Warrior, which is believed to be the ghost of Lord Owashi, the previous feudal lord who died suddenly.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Moso, the late feudal lord’s counselor, and Komei, the chief strategist, are at odds with each other. Neji begins to think that the Cursed Warrior is part of a plot…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Komei is controlling the Cursed Warrior. Moso thwarts Komei's ambitions. The Leaf team feels uneasy about his motives. Neji doesn't want to get involved, but Naruto is defiant. Gamakichi and Gamatatsu are summoned to investigate…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Tenten and Neji have no choice but to listen to Kakashi. He senses that their being followed. Komei has been declared a criminal and is to be executed. The Cursed Warrior appears and snatches Komei away.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sagi swears to punish Moso himself. Naruto is reminded of Sasuke when he sees Sagi. Neither words nor Naruto's attempts to stop him can deter Sagi from his chosen path of revenge.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: At Moso's mansion, a battle takes place between the Wandering Ninja and a Leaf Ninja. With Chishima's help, Naruto is freed from Moso's genjutsu. Moso then reveals his true form as the leader of the Wandering ninja, Hoki!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Choji and Naruto are craving Ichiraku's special ramen only to find out that they find the shop closed! Teuchi reveals that his daughter has been kidnapped by Ryonin, aka the Ninja Chefs, who is after his secret recipes!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Demon of the Ocean is wreaking havoc in the Land of the Sea. Anko leads a team consisting of Naruto, Ino, and Shino. It turns out Anko has an unexpected history with the Land of the Sea.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Unable to find Naruto, Anko meets with officials from the Land of the Sea. The ship carrying government funds that they were supposed to guard sets sail the next day!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: As soon as she awakens, Anko begins to remember Demon Island, a place once visited with her former sensei, Orochimaru. Anko reveals the truth behind the disappearances and the secret behind Isaribi's body.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Amachi and his gang begin their attack on the government ship. Naruto and the others escape from Demon Island, but the sight that greets them is the Land of the Sea fleet on the verge of annihilation.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Hidden Leaf ninja and Amachi battle it out at sea. With Naruto's help, Amachi is defeated, but then a monster appears. Naruto summons Gamabunta in order to defeat the monster.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Kunijiro visits Tsunade and decides to have Naruto guide his boy through one day in the life of a ninja!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto, Kiba, and Hinata are searching for buried treasure at the request of Tsunade's friend Agari Kaisen. Thinking its an easy task since they have a map, Tsunade threatens to send them back to the Academy if they fail.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: After escaping from the cave, Naruto and the others chase after the Kedouin in order to put a halt to their plot, but the Village Hidden in the Leaves is already under attack.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto discovers Jiraiya is up to no good. Jiraiya claims to be busy getting his manuscript ready before his deadline. Impatient and irritated, Naruto writes his own manuscript for Jiraiya!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Hidden Leaf Village receives a request from the Village Hidden in the Stars to guard a star. The star is actually a meteorite that fell 200 years ago and is said to possess mysterious powers.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and the others investigate the whereabouts of the stolen star. The team suspects that is an inside job because the ninja who took the star used the ninja art, Kujaku, from the Star Village.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Akahoshi, the masked ninja who kidnapped Sumaru, intends to use Sumaru to call out the mysterious ninja who stole the star.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The masked ninja and Naruto fall into the depths of the Valley. While tending to Naruto's wounds, the masked ninja tells him the reason for stealing the star.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Natsuhi's body is reacting to the effects of the star. She wields the star and desperately confronts Akahoshi, but Sumaru is taken as hostage

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Sumaru senses his mother's death and Naruto is unable to stop an angry Sumaru from running off. To save Sumaru, Hokuto and Mizura stake their lives to reveal the truth behind the star training.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Akamaru is injured by a rival shinobi from another nation. The shinobi used a battle skill that spreads bacteria throughout the opponent's body, infecting the victim's mental faculties. This causes Akamaru to go into uncontrollable rampage!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A mysterious being attaches itself to Naruto, while he was training in the forest. Tsunade begins to wonder if it isn't the legendary being known as the "Onbaa."

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto and Shino are given a mission to provide security during the Kagetsu family funeral, but they soon realize that the real mission is to help the eldest son carry out the man's unusual last will and testament!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: An ominous black smoke appears over the Land of Greens, and all of sudden Choji and company are attacked by an unidentified Ninja!

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Este es el cuento de un viejo pescador sobre el pez espada que cuelga de la pared del living de Perro y Gato. / Gato sufre una crisis de identidad cuando una banda de gatos bohemios abre una tienda cerca de la casa de Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Desde que era un cachorro, Perro siempre persiguió al camión de la basura, conocido como el viejo 159. / Perro tiene que ponerse un cono sobre su cabeza para protegerse de las picaduras de garrapatas en la oreja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre hermanos se descontrola cuando Papá y Mamá vienen a visitar a Perro y Gato. / Perro realmente tiene un problema cuando descubre que su fuente de alimentación preferida proviene de animales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que le quitaran su disco volador. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras los perros grasos están preparando una trampa para CatDog, una ardilla accidentalmente se pega a la espalda de Cliff. /Debido a la escasez de fondos, CatDog opta por no intercambiar regalos en el “Día del hermano” este año.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cuando Perro desobedece las normas de la piscina de la comunidad, él y Gato son arrestados por el guardavidas y los llevan a prisión. / Gato se ve consumido al coleccionar figuras. A medida que su colección crece las figuras le hablan.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: ¿Es el final de Gato y Perro? Cansados de ser un dos cabezas, Gato decide hacerse una cirugía para separarse de Perro. / Perro y Gato una vez más corren por sus vidas de los Perros Grasosos hacia la seguridad de su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La amiga sueca de Cat, Ingrid, viene a visitarlo. Sin embargo, esto podría ser un problema, una vez que haya ocultado la verdad acerca de CatDog. El nuevo cartero llega y le entrega las cartas antes de que Dog pueda perseguirlo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que solo tiene una vida a diferencia de las nueve vidas de Gato, Perro se pone obsesivo con la seguridad. /Cansado de los modos paternales de Gato, Perro se escapa de la casa.

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dark King Rayleigh takes Luffy to a deadly, deserted island for two years of intense battle training! If the Straw Hat captain wants to survive in the New World, he'll have to hone his hidden powers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After two years of rigorous training, the new and improved Straw Hats make their way to Sabaody Archipelago, but their long-awaited reunion is spoiled by a villainous gang of imposters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy picks a fight with himself, Chopper falls in with a dubious crowd of imitation pirates, and Zorro causes a commotion when he falls asleep on the wrong ship!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper struggles to make sense of the changes his "friends" have undergone in the last two years, and the Navy mobilizes in an attempt to stop the pirate posers. Will the real Straw Hats please stand up?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Usopp flip over Franky's new body, Brook must choose between rock-n-roll stardom and the life of a pirate, and Luffy wanders into a very dangerous crowd!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the rest of the Straw Hats prepare to set sail, Luffy gets a chance to show off his new powers in a brutal throw down between notorious pirates, navy soldiers, and deadly Pacifistas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew are finally reunited, but before they can set sail, they'll need help from Dark King Rayleigh, Boa Hancock, and all the friends they've made in the last two years!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As word of the Straw Hat resurrection spreads through the Navy, Luffy and his crew get acclimated to their underwater environment, and Franky reveals the startling identity of the man who protected their ship!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are attacked by a rival gang of pirates, but that may be the least of their worries. Luffy and his crew are on a collision course with a cantankerous Kraken!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their quarrel with the Kraken, the Straw Hats find themselves in hot water as Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji turn up missing, and the rest of the crew runs short on air!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to a little help from a friend, Luffy saves his mates from a ghost ship captained by a deranged Dutchman! Unfortunately, their happy reunion is cut short by a volcanic eruption! Can the Hats take the heat?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally make it to Fish-Man Island, but their reputation precedes them, leading to trouble with the New Fish-Man Pirates! Only a daring maneuver can get them out of hot water, but there's no guarantee they'll survive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Sanji gets up close and personal with a mesmerizing mermaid, his extreme fondness for the female form lands him in a life and death situation. Could the Straw Hat chef die from a nosebleed?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Sanji gets up close and personal with a mesmerizing mermaid, his extreme fondness for the female form lands him in a life and death situation. Could the Straw Hat chef die from a nosebleed?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After two generous donors save Sanji from death by nosebleed, Luffy and Usopp take a tour of the island. But their welcome is worn out when a mystic mermaid has a terrifying vision—that Fish-Man Island will be destroyed at the hands of a Straw Hat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After reuniting with Nami, Luffy and the gang are invited to the royal palace of Neptune, god of the sea! Meanwhile, the New Fish-Man Pirates exploit the power of a designer steroid in order to terrorize humans!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A trio of unsuspecting mermaids find themselves in hot water after releasing a bad guy from his barrel of a prison. Over at the royal palace, Luffy gets up close and personal with the Mermaid Princess!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's lightning reflexes spare the Mermaid Princess from a grisly death, Neptune's army attempts to apprehend the Straw Hats, and Captain Vander Decken forges a sinister undersea alliance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their backs against the wall, the Straw Hats are forced to take King Neptune and his men hostage. On the other side of the palace, Luffy and the Mermaid Princess make plans to visit the Sea Forrest!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy accidentally "kidnaps" the Mermaid Princess, an old friend issues a grave warning to Chopper and Sanji, and the New Fish-Man Pirates prepare for a raid on Ryugu Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Captain Vander Decken and Hordy Jones manage to successfully breach the defenses of Ryugu Palace. Meanwhile, Jimbei waits patiently for Luffy to arrive at the Sea Forest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin ventures into the forest in search of ancient secrets, Zoro takes to the water for a slicing, dicing showdown with Hordy Jones, and Luffy is branded a royal kidnapper by an angry mob of fish folk!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Chopper, and Sanji are taken prisoner by a fish mob just as Vander Decken launches an attack the princess! Elsewhere, Zoro continues his battle with Hordy, and Nami hitches a ride on a mermaid to escape the crumbling palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Neptune fight bravely, but they're no match for Hordy and his pill-popping minions. Back at the ship, Luffy reunites with Jimbei, who reveals something sinister about his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The New Fish-Man Pirates continue their bloody and violent uprising, and Jimbei begins the story of how he unleashed the monster known as Arlong on the unsuspecting citizens of the East Blue.

programme.desc: The last unicorns are under threat from the Terrons, who believe their horns have magic properties.

programme.desc: Ketzwayo is brought back to life in order to infect animals with madness - a madness that affects Dar as well.

programme.title: Beastmaster

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Journalist Maggie Freleng searches for answers in the 2004 disappearance of a nursing student following a car crash in New Hampshire.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: There are questions about happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire: did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride with a dangerous stranger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: New Hampshire's law enforcement community keeps their findings of Maura's case close to the chest; Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Killers and kidnappers are Maggie's focus as she works to find out if Maura Murray was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: The DNA results are revealed; Maggie seeks the advice of a psychic; a wild lead is pursued at the top of a mountain; Maggie sits down with Maura's family and reveals evidence released by law enforcement for the first time in 13 years.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers, mother of five, vanishes, leaving her car abandoned in Bardstown, Ky.; a year later her father is shot dead while searching for her; there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne look through Tommy Ballard's box of papers and evidence in Crystal's case.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: The FBI grills the brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown police officer; Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent; exploring the scene of a deadly ambush on the Bluegrass Parkway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer; family members of Bardstown's other victims speak; a mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: With the first anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaching, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward; an unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen -- and intriguing -- direction.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne speak with an informant who shares new information about the crimes in Bardstown; they follow up on the informant's claims and discover potential new details unknown to investigators.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon

programme.title: Live and Let Die

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun

programme.title: 007: Thunderball (ESP)

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: An advanced $900 million planetary explorer designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal intricate details undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: The night sky has always been a source of wonder and mystery. In the quest to explore the universe, our greatest ally is the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Painted By Light
programme.desc: When the universe formed, all of space blazed white-hot, but it didn't last. Darkness reined for 200 million years before the light was reborn.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Discovering the transport networks of the past.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A flamboyant French Formula One driver aims to dethrone NASCAR superstar Ricky Bobby, whose 'win at all costs' approach has made him a national hero. Now Ricky Bobby must face his own demons and fight Girard for the title of racing's top driver.

programme.title: The Mexican

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie convert one of their rigs to run on veggie oil and end up making a bet with the shipper--beat the tight, cross-country deadline and do it all on free grease.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc's buddy, Johnny Chavez finally wins a load, but his day in the sun will be overshadowed when Marc pranks his run.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: As Rick and Cindy try to give up smoking at an auction in Leslieville, they cope by making sure everyone else suffers right along with them.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart finally snaps when Paul buys yet another lousy locker at an auction in Toronto’s Liberty Village.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy antagonizes the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans. Rick preaches caution, but Cindy goes for the big score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A team of scientists are surveying the city for damage after the storm when they unknowingly release a virus causing hallucinations and death. The virus infects McKay, Zelenka, and Ford leaving Sheppard to stop it from spreading further.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploration of the city, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find an old woman in suspended animation. Thinking her to be an Ancient, the team wakes her up, only to discover that it is Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson).

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches for a valuable Zero Point Module rumored to be hidden on the planet Dagan, where the Sudarians were trusted with the module over 10,000 years ago. In their search the team begin to worry about their new allies, and their motives

programme.desc: Plagued by terrifying nightmares, Teyla (Rachel Luttrell) begins to recall a time when she and her father were captured by the Wraith and subjected to disturbing experiments. With the help of an old Athosian woman, Teyla looks deep into her past.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world, there are places and objects that are thought to be cursed; many people avoid these locations and things, believing they will bring harm, while others think that curses are nothing more than superstition and folklore.

programme.desc: For centuries, humanity has been compelled to build remarkable structures that are much more than simple places of shelter or work.

programme.desc: According to the Greek philosopher Plato, the lost continent of Atlantis was once home to an advanced civilization before it was destroyed in a cataclysm; for centuries, archaeologists have tried to uncover evidence to prove that this legend is true.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: For centuries, humanity has been compelled to build remarkable structures that are much more than simple places of shelter or work.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: More than 7 billion people live on Earth; human civilizations span the globe; although many around the globe believe that the divine hand of God placed humans on Earth, others question whether there were ever other kinds of human-like creatures.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world, there are places and objects that are thought to be cursed; many people avoid these locations and things, believing they will bring harm, while others think that curses are nothing more than superstition and folklore.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: A look at the visions of mystics, prophets and clairvoyants throughout history, what their prophecies reveal and predictions for the future.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve's attempts to save a rare cougar place a woman trail-guide (Jess Walton) between him and hunters.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve teams with a clairvoyant teen to stop a foreign power from obtaining laser-weapons secrets; guest Dick Van Patten.

programme.desc: Flu-sufferer Bonnie sees a man in a gorilla suit strangle a woman, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Ordered to take time off, Crockett's vacation is cut short when he is abducted by three homicidal prison escapees.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Tubbs and Castillo attempt to intervene in a drug deal in which government agents want no police interference.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo

programme.title: Columbo

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Leon is Zigfried's younger brother, and he'll avenge his family's loss. Leon's fairy tales are giving Yugi nightmares but the worst is yet to come as Leon has Zigfried's mysterious and special card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Golden Castle of Stromberg is infecting the world's Duel Disks with a virus that will destroy KaibaCorp. If Yugi doesn't destroy the card, the virus program can't be stopped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang goes on an exotic trip to India, but when their plane crashes in a deserted forest, their vacation turns into a dangerous game of survival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Realizing that they've become part of a real-life version of the Capsule Monsters board game, the gang struggles to find a way out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice. But their celebration is soon interrupted by a pack of man-eating wolves, a giant turtle, and an angry Genie!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the "Fortress of Fear." Now they have until sunset to find this mysterious structure or they'll be trapped in the world of Capsule Monsters forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends discover that in order to return home to the real world they must pass a series of tests: the Five Sacred Trials. The first of which pits them against enormous sand worms and a mysterious voice that travels with the desert wind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping their battle in the desert, the gang finds themselves stranded on a mysterious floating island, where they face a monster that derives its strength from the sun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.
